---
title: "check and install packages"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## CRAN Libraries

First check and install packages from CRAN

```{r}

#| label: Configure libraries

dependentPackages <-
  c('pbapply', 'geiger', 'foreach', 'doParallel', 'doSNOW', 'Rogue', 'zoo', 'rncl', 'solrium', 'WikipediR','dismo','rJava','rworldmap','maps','mapview','dplyr','stringr','sf','terra','leafsync','geodata','raster','leaflet','rgbif','mapview','sf','dplyr','sfheaders','maps','countrycode','sp','rworldmap','data.table','dplyr', 'BiocManager', 'devtools')

for (i in dependentPackages) {
  print(paste0("Checking for: ", i))
  
  # First check if you have the package installed
  check_for_package <- system.file(package = i)
  print(check_for_package)
  
  # If not run the following code to install it.
  if (check_for_package == "") {
    print(paste0(i, " package not found .....installing now"))
    install.packages(i)
  } else {
    print(paste0(i, " package is already installed"))
  }
}

```

## Biconductor Libraries

install packages from bioconductor

```{r}

#| label: Configure Bioconductor libraries

if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE)) {
  install.packages("BiocManager")
}

BiocManager::install(update = TRUE, ask = FALSE)

biocPackages <- c("DECIPHER", "Biostrings", "msa", "odseq")

for (pkg in biocPackages) {

  message("Checking for: ", pkg)

  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE)) {
    
    message(pkg, " not found ..... installing now")
    BiocManager::install(pkg, ask = FALSE, update = FALSE)
    
  } else {
    
    message(pkg, " package is already installed")
    
  }
}

```

## install using devtools

install from devtools

```{r}
#| label: Configure non-CRAN libraries

# ---- ensure required installers exist ----
if (!requireNamespace("remotes", quietly = TRUE)) {
  install.packages("remotes")
}

if (!requireNamespace("devtools", quietly = TRUE)) {
  install.packages("devtools")
}

# ---- packages to install ----
extraPackages <- list(
  list(name = "reutils",          type = "github", repo = "gschofl/reutils"),
  list(name = "phruta",           type = "repo",   repo = "https://ropensci.r-universe.dev"),
  list(name = "kewr",             type = "github", repo = "barnabywalker/kewr"),
  list(name = "climatchR",        type = "git",    repo = "https://code.usgs.gov/umesc/quant-ecology/climatchr.git"),
  list(name = "ClimDatDownloadR", type = "github", repo = "HelgeJentsch/ClimDatDownloadR")
)

for (pkg in extraPackages) {

  pkg_name <- pkg$name
  
  print(paste0("Checking for: ", pkg_name))
  
  check_for_package <- system.file(package = pkg_name)
  print(check_for_package)
  
  if (check_for_package == "") {

    print(paste0(pkg_name, " package not found ..... installing now"))

    if (pkg$type == "repo") {
      install.packages(pkg_name, repos = pkg$repo)
    }

    if (pkg$type == "github") {
      remotes::install_github(pkg$repo, upgrade = "never")
    }

    if (pkg$type == "git") {
      remotes::install_git(pkg$repo, upgrade = "never")
    }

  } else {

    print(paste0(pkg_name, " package is already installed"))

  }
}

```
